title: Granular Airbrush
description: Ce style reproduit l'esthétique onirique et nostalgique de la photographie argentique 35 mm capturée avec des objectifs vintage. Il se caractérise par une très faible profondeur de champ, un grain de film ISO prononcé et d'immenses fuites de lumière optiques vibrantes qui obscurcissent physiquement des parties de l'image. L'étalonnage des couleurs s'appuie sur des éclairages gélatinés cinématographiques, créant une atmosphère douce, mélancolique mais intensément colorée avec un halo prononcé autour des hautes lumières.
description_en: This style replicates the dreamy, nostalgic aesthetic of 35mm analog film photography shot through vintage lenses. It is characterized by extreme shallow depth of field, heavy ISO film grain, and massive, vibrant optical light leaks that physically obscure parts of the frame. The color grading relies on cinematic gel lighting, creating a soft, melancholic yet intensely colorful atmosphere with pronounced halation around highlights.
description_fr: Ce style reproduit l'esthétique onirique et nostalgique de la photographie argentique 35 mm capturée avec des objectifs vintage. Il se caractérise par une très faible profondeur de champ, un grain de film ISO prononcé et d'immenses fuites de lumière optiques vibrantes qui obscurcissent physiquement des parties de l'image. L'étalonnage des couleurs s'appuie sur des éclairages gélatinés cinématographiques, créant une atmosphère douce, mélancolique mais intensément colorée avec un halo prononcé autour des hautes lumières.
prompt: Cinematic 35mm analog film photography emulation, capturing a deeply atmospheric and nostalgic portrayal of {{subject}}. The rendering technique meticulously mimics a vintage optical lens shot wide open, producing an extreme shallow depth of field where only the core details of the {{subject}} remain in focus, while the surrounding spatial environment melts into a heavy, creamy bokeh. The lighting anatomy is defined by complex, colorful gel lighting setups, with a soft, diffused {{primary_color}} key light gently illuminating the surface contours and structural features of the {{subject}}. The most defining visual hallmark of this style is a massive, intensely vibrant {{accent_color}} optical light leak and lens flare sweeping aggressively across the foreground, physically obscuring and washing out a significant portion of the frame and the {{subject}} with a semi-transparent, glowing gradient of color. The background is pushed entirely out of focus, bathed in moody, deep {{secondary_color}} tones that provide a striking chromatic contrast to the warm, intrusive foreground light leaks. The materiality and texture are heavily tactile, featuring pronounced high-ISO analog film grain, subtle chromatic aberration at the extreme optical edges, and distinct halation blooming naturally around any bright highlights. Edge transitions are organically soft, feathered, and purely dictated by the optical blur rather than sharp, artificial cutouts. The composition feels intimate, voyeuristic, and enveloped in a dense, melancholic yet vibrant atmosphere. The image MUST occupy the absolute ENTIRE dedicated space: NO borders, NO frames, NO white margins, NO canvas edges, FULL BLEED to all four corners, the environment must stretch entirely across the canvas.
prompt_removebg: Cinematic 35mm analog film photography emulation, capturing a deeply atmospheric and nostalgic portrayal of {{subject}}. The rendering technique meticulously mimics a vintage optical lens shot wide open, producing an extreme shallow depth of field where only the core details of the {{subject}} remain in focus, while the surrounding spatial environment melts into a heavy, creamy bokeh. The lighting anatomy is defined by complex, colorful gel lighting setups, with a soft, diffused {{primary_color}} key light gently illuminating the surface contours and structural features of the {{subject}}. The most defining visual hallmark of this style is a massive, intensely vibrant {{accent_color}} optical light leak and lens flare sweeping aggressively across the foreground, physically obscuring and washing out a significant portion of the frame and the {{subject}} with a semi-transparent, glowing gradient of color. The {{subject}} is composited on a clean {{background_color}} surface, with the background pushed entirely out of focus and bathed in moody, deep {{secondary_color}} tones that blend into the flat {{background_color}} backdrop, providing a striking chromatic contrast to the warm, intrusive foreground light leaks. The materiality and texture are heavily tactile, featuring pronounced high-ISO analog film grain, subtle chromatic aberration at the extreme optical edges, and distinct halation blooming naturally around any bright highlights. Edge transitions are organically soft, feathered, and purely dictated by the optical blur, explicitly allowing intentional overflow where parts of the {{subject}} and the sweeping light leak can extend beyond the visible frame and seamlessly interact with the {{background_color}}. The composition feels intimate, voyeuristic, and enveloped in a dense, melancholic yet vibrant atmosphere.
background_prompt: A purely atmospheric cinematic background environment, mimicking 35mm analog film shot through a vintage lens wide open. The scene consists of entirely out-of-focus spatial elements melting into a heavy, creamy bokeh. Deep, moody {{secondary_color}} tones dominate the distant ambient space, while a soft {{primary_color}} ambient glow provides subtle structural illumination. A massive, intensely vibrant {{accent_color}} optical light leak washes across the foreground, introducing pronounced high-ISO film grain, chromatic aberration, and glowing halation without any specific focal subject.
background_prompt_removebg: A purely atmospheric cinematic background environment, mimicking 35mm analog film shot through a vintage lens wide open, rendered against a flat {{background_color}} backdrop. The scene consists of entirely out-of-focus spatial elements melting into a heavy, creamy bokeh that seamlessly fades into the {{background_color}} surface. Deep, moody {{secondary_color}} tones dominate the distant ambient space, while a soft {{primary_color}} ambient glow provides subtle structural illumination. A massive, intensely vibrant {{accent_color}} optical light leak washes across the foreground, acting as a decorative overlay element placed in front of the invisible subject to create profound depth, introducing pronounced high-ISO film grain, chromatic aberration, and glowing halation that bleeds into the {{background_color}}.
